title: AI Toolkit Profiles
description: Role-based profiles that select agents, rules, skills, hooks, and MCPs.

global_rules.description: Rules deployed to every profile automatically. Same structure as profile-level rules: grouped by arbitrary label.

rules.description: Rules grouped by logical label (e.g. 'data', 'collaboration'). Keys are arbitrary — they do not need to match src/rules/ subdirectory names. Rule filenames must be unique repo-wide; the deploy script resolves them by recursive search regardless of the key used.

hooks.description: Hook names (match filenames in src/hooks/ without extension).

mcps.description: MCP names (match top-level keys in src/mcps.yaml).
